requirement_topic.en: EMRC / NEPCO Storage and Grid-Connection Review

summary.en: A grid-connected BESS in Jordan should be treated as a project-specific electricity regulatory and utility review. EMRC is the energy regulator, while NEPCO is the national transmission and system operator interface. Depending on project model and connection point, storage may need licensing or approval, interconnection studies, protection and metering review, dispatch or operating conditions, communications, commissioning tests, and contract-specific storage controls.
summary.zh: 约旦并网BESS应按项目特定的电力监管和公用事业审查处理。EMRC是能源监管机构，NEPCO是国家输电和系统运营接口。根据项目模式和接入点，储能可能需要许可或批准、接入研究、保护和计量审查、调度或运行条件、通信、调试测试以及合同特定储能控制。
summary.zht: 約旦併網BESS應按項目特定的電力監管和公用事業審查處理。EMRC是能源監管機構，NEPCO是國家輸電和系統營運介面。根據項目模式和接入點，儲能可能需要許可或批准、接入研究、保護和計量審查、調度或運行條件、通訊、調試測試以及合約特定儲能控制。

standards_or_laws: EMRC electricity licensing, renewable-energy, and regulatory instructions where applicable
Project-specific PPA, wheeling, self-generation, tender, or connection agreement

summary.en: China-side grid files commonly include GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence, PCS factory settings, protection studies, and China grid-company commissioning records. These materials can support engineering review but do not replace EMRC approval or NEPCO connection acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国侧并网文件通常包括GB/T 36558-2023系统证据、PCS出厂整定、保护研究和中国电网公司调试记录。这些资料可支持工程审查，但不能替代EMRC批准或NEPCO接入接受。
summary.zht: 中國側併網文件通常包括GB/T 36558-2023系統證據、PCS出廠整定、保護研究和中國電網公司調試記錄。這些資料可支持工程審查，但不能替代EMRC批准或NEPCO接入接受。

gap.en: Prepare a Jordan-specific grid package covering point of connection, voltage class, short-circuit duty, protection coordination, anti-islanding, active and reactive power control, ramp-rate limits, harmonics, grounding, metering, SCADA / telemetry, dispatch instructions, commissioning tests, and storage operating modes.
gap.zh: 应准备约旦特定并网资料包，涵盖接入点、电压等级、短路容量、保护配合、防孤岛、有功和无功控制、爬坡率限制、谐波、接地、计量、SCADA/远动、调度指令、调试测试和储能运行模式。
gap.zht: 應準備約旦特定併網資料包，涵蓋接入點、電壓等級、短路容量、保護配合、防孤島、有功和無功控制、爬坡率限制、諧波、接地、計量、SCADA／遠動、調度指令、調試測試和儲能運行模式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where EMRC licensing or approval, NEPCO interconnection, distribution-company approval, tender, PPA, owner, insurer, or lender requires review; details are project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected BESS through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

source.publisher: Energy and Minerals Regulatory Commission (EMRC), Jordan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China grid evidence is not EMRC or NEPCO acceptance. Treat Jordan BESS interconnection as a project-specific regulator, utility, and contract review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国并网证据不是EMRC或NEPCO接受结论。应将约旦BESS并网作为项目特定的监管机构、公用事业单位和合同审查处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國併網證據不是EMRC或NEPCO接受結論。應將約旦BESS併網作為項目特定的監管機構、公用事業單位和合約審查處理。
